manual.description: No upstream MCP servers are enabled by default. Add any MCP server to mcp_settings.json; add mcpace.config.json policy only when needed.

labs.description: Empty sandbox profile; use it for local experiments by adding explicit serverOverrides.

clientCatalog.description: Optional external client target catalog. Built-ins remain a fallback; entries here or MCPACE_CLIENT_CATALOG can add/override clients without recompiling.

serve.description: Advertised Streamable HTTP endpoint. publicUrl overrides local host/port/path for client install/export when a relay or public ingress is used.

mcpSettings.description: Optional additional MCP settings JSON files/directories. Sources are merged in order: mcp_settings.json, default mcp_settings.d/*.json, includePaths/includeDirs, MCPACE_MCP_SETTINGS, then MCPACE_MCP_SETTINGS_DIRS; later duplicate server names override earlier ones.

mcpPresets.description: Editable useful-MCP preset catalogs. Sources are merged in order and can be extended with MCPACE_MCP_PRESETS; later duplicate preset ids override earlier ones.
